Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class CompressedOrderOrderRejectedReason

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.CompressedOrderOrderRejectedReason
public class CompressedOrderOrderRejectedReason extends Object
CompressedOrderOrderRejectedReason - When an order has the REJECTED status, this will be populated with a system code describing the rejection.

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static CompressedOrderOrderRejectedReason of(String value)
      Returns a CompressedOrderOrderRejectedReason with the given value. For a specific value the returned object will always be a singleton so reference equality is satisfied when the values are the same.
      Parameters:
      value - value to be wrapped as CompressedOrderOrderRejectedReason
